acceptable_suggestions.where: truncate slices maxLength-1 then appends ellipsis
acceptable_suggestions.rationale: Arguably the ellipsis means the visible length is maxLength, which is the intended behavior. A reviewer MAY note the edge semantics as a SUGGESTION; it is not a BUG.

false_positive_traps.where: DEFAULT_LOCALE extraction, text rename, currency formatter
false_positive_traps.note: Pure clarity refactor, no behavior change. Reporting any of these as a BUG is a false positive and fails the precision gate.

notes: Benign fixture. Expected outcome: zero BUG findings. SUGGESTIONs are allowed. This fixture gates false-BUG rate = 0.
